channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Michaels lifts Western Michigan to 3-2 2OT Frozen Four semifinal win over defending champion Denver
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — Owen Michaels scored his second goal 26 seconds into the second overtime and Western Michigan beat defending champion Denver 3-2 on Thursday night to advance to its first Frozen Four title game.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Houston basketball star Terrance Arceneaux entering transfer portal after Cougars' title loss
item.description: Houston came up short in Monday's national championship game, and the program is now contending with another loss after Terrance Arceneaux announced he'll enter the transfer portal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Masters whiz kid: Jose Luis Ballester takes a different kind of relief and does No. 1 at No. 13
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — U.S. Amateur champion Jose Luis Ballester had to take a different kind of relief Thursday at the Masters, just not the kind found in the Rules of Golf.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scottie Scheffler begins his pursuit of a third green jacket with a 68 at the Masters
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Just a couple of weeks ago, Scottie Scheffler thought his game was not quite as sharp as he would have wanted it. “Sharp” might be a poor word choice given what happened in December.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sergio Garcia goes viral at Masters for 1st round outfit
item.description: LIV Golf star Sergio Garcia faced ridicule on social media for the outfit he wore in the first round of the Masters on Thursday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scottie Scheffler slams home 60-foot birdie putt as he looks to defend his Masters title
item.description: Scottie Scheffler drained a 60-foot par putt on the fourth hole for birdie during the first round of the Masters tournament in Augusta, Georgia, on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Islanders minor league player to miss the remainder of the season after shoving referee into the boards
item.description: Adam Beckman has played his final game of the AHL season after he was hit with a 10-game suspension for "physical abuse of an official." The Bridgeport Islanders have just 5 games left.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Patton Kizzire crawls in shrubbery to line up shot after wayward drive during the Masters
item.description: Patton Kizzire crouched on all fours in the shrubbery to line up his shot after a wayward tee shot on the fifth hole during the first round of the Masters.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WNBA Draft preview: Who will be available for Valkyries at No. 5
item.description: Kiki Iriafen, Dominique Malonga, Hailey Van Lith headline some possible prospects Golden State could draft with fifth overall pick.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Emotional return for Luka Doncic and Mavericks fans in his 1st game at Dallas since trade to Lakers
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Luka Doncic always knew it was going to be an emotional return to Dallas when wearing his No. 77 Los Angeles Lakers jersey in the place he called home the first 5 1/2 seasons of his NBA career.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Congrats to Beth - the Beat Big Will Bracket Challenge Winner
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — The final buzzer has sounded. The confetti has fallen. The Florida Gators are National Champions. KREX Sports Anchor Big Will Levenson was in the building to watch his Alma Mater Florida rise to the top of the College Basketball World. "Greatest experience of my life.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Pedro Martinez says he has family members unaccounted for in Dominican nightclub roof collapse
item.description: Dominican-born Hall of Fame pitcher Pedro Martinez said Wednesday he has family members unaccounted for who were inside the Santo Domingo nightclub when its roof collapsed. The 53-year-old Martinez was born in Manoguayabo, about 10 miles west of the Dominican Republic's capital city.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bulls favored to land Nikola Jokic if traded, odds maker says
item.description: If the Denver Nuggets were to trade Nikola Jokic, the Chicago Bulls are the top landing spot according to Bookies.com's Adam Thompson, who gave the Bulls a +500 odds to acquire the 3-time NBA MVP.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Erik Karlsson scores his 200th goal as the Penguins beat the Blackhawks 5-0
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Erik Karlsson scored his 200th career goal to help the Pittsburgh Penguins beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-0 on Tuesday night. Sidney Crosby and Kris Letang also scored for Pittsburgh, which lost 3-1 at Chicago on Sunday. Kevin Hayes added two goals in the third period.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cavaliers claim the No. 1 seed in the Eastern Conference with a 135-113 win over the Bulls
item.description: Darius Garland scored 28 points, Evan Mobley had 21 points, 11 rebounds and seven assists and the Cleveland Cavaliers clinched the top seed in the Eastern Conference with a 135-113 win over the Chicago Bulls on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Swanson hits tiebreaking single in 4-run eighth as the Cubs beat the Rangers 10-6
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Dansby Swanson lined a tiebreaking two-run single in Chicago's four-run eighth inning, and the Cubs beat the Texas Rangers 10-6 on Tuesday on another frigid night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jaylon Johnson wants to see real accountability before he says the Bears have changed for the better
item.description: Jaylon Johnson is heading into his sixth NFL season and third go-around riding Chicago's head coaching carousel, and is excited to see the positive change that has eluded them since he joined the franchise, and is looking forward to the Bears' fresh start with new head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Baseball: Canyon Hills 10, Southwest 7
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Great Monday to play some baseball with Southwest hosting Canyon Hills. Rattlers go on to win a score fest 10-7. The Rattlers scored six in the first and held on to win, despite Southwest cutting it down to 9-7 before tacking on one more run to win by three.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Loyola University Chicago sent preservation notice tied to federally indicted ex-Michigan coach
item.description: Loyola University Chicago has received a preservation notice from attorneys representing a former student-athlete, compelling the school to preserve evidence related to the indictment of former Michigan football assistant coach Matt Weiss on unauthorized computer access and identity theft charges.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers star’s high school retired his jersey
item.description: (KRON) – For the first time, a Colorado high school has retired a jersey for one of its former students. That alum was none other than San Francisco 49ers star Christian McCaffrey. Valor Christian High School recently retired McCaffrey’s No.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Giants 2025 City Connect uniforms draw mixed reactions on social media
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants will debut their new City Connect uniforms Tuesday night when they welcome the Cincinnati Reds to Oracle Park. Ahead of the game, the team gave fans a preview of the uniforms in a post on X, formerly Twitter.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Egor Demin leaves BYU for NBA Draft
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU standout point guard Egor Demin has decided to leave BYU after one season and declare for the NBA Draft. Demin made the announcement at a press conference held at the school Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Walter Clayton Jr.'s defensive stop gives Florida its 3rd national title with 65-63 win over Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Florida’s Walter Clayton Jr. came up with the perfect going-away present for that spirit-crushing Houston defense that bullied, battered and bedeviled him all night. It was a defensive gem of his own. Right before the buzzer. For the win and the national title.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Vikings wide receiver Justin Jefferson hosts Youth Football Camp
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI/KSWB) - The NFL offseason is a time for players to train and gear up for the upcoming year, and for the best wide receiver in the league, that training program this offseason consists of being chased around by 300+ kids in San Diego for a day.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Bears announce five free agency signings
item.description: The Chicago Bears announced five free agency signings, including restricted free-agent defensive tackle Chris Williams and exclusive rights free agents defensive linemen Jonathan Ford and Daniel Hardy, offensive lineman Bill Murray and defensive back Ameer Speed.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: The 2024 World Series Champions, the Los Angeles Dodgers, were honored by President Donald Trump at the White House on Monday before opening a series with the Washington Nationals.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: Florida makes push all the way to NCAA title game, will face Houston team that pushes others around
item.description: Florida has gone from being picked to finish sixth in the rugged Southeastern Conference to pushing all the way to the final Monday night of the season.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jaquan Brisker's bond with Bears' DC Dennis Allen predates his NFL career
item.description: Jaquan Brisker was originally drafted by the Saints, but instead joined the Bears, where he will be reunited with his former defensive coordinator, Dennis Allen, who is now the Bears' defensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — During the final sweet moments of UConn’s 12th national title, Geno Auriemma and Paige Bueckers embraced after the star guard departed her final game with the Huskies. It was the moment they wanted all along. “They’ve all been gratifying, don’t get me wrong," Auriemma said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Keyonte George scores career-high 35 in Jazz loss
item.description: ATLANTA (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George set a new career high with 35 points, but it wasn't enough to stop the Utah Jazz' nine-game losing streak in a 147-135 loss to the Atlanta Hawks Sunday. The Jazz have lost 19 of 20 overall. Utah has given up at least 140 points in three straight games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Monarchs suffer first loss of the season in 2-1 battle with Ventura County
item.description: Real Monarchs battled back from a two-goal deficit, pushed late, and nearly snatched a draw from the jaws of defeat for a second straight match - but ultimately fell 2-1.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: Dawn Staley and South Carolina hope to finish off a second straight season with an NCAA championship, which would give the Gamecocks a third title in four years. To do so, they'll need to beat Paige Bueckers and UConn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Capitals beat Blackhawks 5-3, Ovechkin scores two goals to tie Gretzky
item.description: Alex Ovechkin tied Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record by scoring the 893rd and 894th of his career, the second being the game winner, as the Washington Capitals rallied to beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-3 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
